amendment.description: An amendment numbered 26 printed in Part B of House Report 119-628 to require the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to review and recommend changes to its satellite rules to promote precision agriculture.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Latta amendment (A017) Agreed to by voice vote.

action.text: House amendment agreed to: On agreeing to the Latta amendment (A017) Agreed to by voice vote.
